actionEn: You may only turn right ahead of the sign; going straight or left is prohibited.
Turning right is mandatory from the sign's location onward.
You may only turn left ahead of the sign.
Turning left is mandatory from the sign's location onward.
Only straight travel is allowed, turns are prohibited.
Only straight or right travel is allowed.
Only straight or left travel is allowed.
A left or right turn is allowed, going straight is prohibited.
Pass the obstacle or island only on the right side.
Pass the obstacle or island only on the left side.
The obstacle can be passed on either side (right or left).
A roundabout is mandatory at this intersection — yield to traffic already on it.
This path is for cyclists only — pedestrians and other traffic are prohibited.

nameEn: Shared path for pedestrians and cyclists
actionEn: This path is shared by pedestrians and cyclists — keep to the designated part.
The mandatory bike path ends here.
Travelling slower than the stated speed is prohibited — observe the minimum speed.
The minimum speed requirement ends here.
This path is for pedestrians only — vehicles are prohibited from entering.
The mandatory pedestrian path ends here.

nameEn: Direction for vehicles with dangerous goods
actionEn: Vehicles carrying dangerous goods must travel only in this direction.
Using snow chains on the wheels is mandatory on this section.
The snow-chain requirement ends here.
